zh.Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾馬爾斯波利
zh.Malmsbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾馬爾斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury於1510年出生在英國維爾爾馬爾斯波利時，他的父親Willem Stumpe26歲，母親Joyce Berkeley20歲。他於1535年與Lady Bridget de Baynton在英國維爾爾馬爾斯波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1563年4月29日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾馬爾斯波利
zh-hans.Malmsbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾馬爾斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury于1510年出生在英国維爾爾馬爾斯波利时，他的父亲Willem Stumpe26岁，母亲Joyce Berkeley20岁。他于1535年与Lady Bridget de Baynton在英国維爾爾馬爾斯波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1563年4月29日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stumpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stump
meanings: English and German: from Middle Low German stump ‘tree stump’ (borrowed into Middle English), hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent tree stump, or else a nickname for a short, stocky person.
German: nickname from Middle High German stumpf ‘maimed, mentally incompetent’ for a dull or inexperienced person.
German (mainly northern and central): variant of   Stumm  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury was born in 1510, in Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Willem Stumpe, was 26 and his mother, Joyce Berkeley, was 20. He married Lady Bridget de Baynton in 1535, in Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 29 April 1563, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury est né en 1510, à Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Willem Stumpe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joyce Berkeley, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Bridget de Baynton en 1535, à Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1563, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury 1510 in Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem Stumpe 26 und seine Mutter Joyce Berkeley 20. Er hat 1535 in Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England Lady Bridget de Baynton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. April 1563 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury è nato il nel 1510 nel Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Willem Stumpe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joyce Berkeley, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Bridget de Baynton nel 1535, nel Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 aprile 1563, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリー
ja.Malmsbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Stumpe of Malmesburyが1510年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリーで生まれた時，父Willem Stumpeは26歳，母Joyce Berkeleyは20歳であった。1535年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリーでLady Bridget de Bayntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1563年4月29日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury(이)가 1510년 영국 윌츠히르 맬메스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem Stumpe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Berkeley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 윌츠히르 맬메스버이에서 Lady Bridget de Baynton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1563년 4월 29일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury nasceu em 1510, em Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Willem Stumpe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Berkeley, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Bridget de Baynton em 1535, em Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1563, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury родился в 1510 г. в местности малмесбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Willem Stumpe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Berkeley, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Bridget de Baynton в 1535 г. в местности малмесбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 апреля 1563 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury nació en 1510, en Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Willem Stumpe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joyce Berkeley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Bridget de Baynton en 1535, en Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de abril de 1563, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
